title: Emoji Picker - Search & Copy Emojis
seoDescription: Free online emoji picker and emoji keyboard. Search, browse, and copy emojis instantly. Browse by categories: smileys, people, animals, food, activities, travel, objects, symbols, and flags. Click any emoji to copy to clipboard.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Emoji Picker
step1Desc: Browse emojis by category or type a keyword like smile, heart, cat, food, or weather in the search box. The list updates instantly as you type.
step2Desc: Click any emoji to copy it to your clipboard. A Copied confirmation appears briefly. The emoji is saved to your recent list for quick access.
step3Desc: Paste the copied emoji into your messages, social media posts, emails, documents, or anywhere you want to express yourself. Works on all platforms.
use2: Add emotion to messages and emails
faq1A: Over 1,800 emojis from the Unicode standard, organized into 9 categories: smileys, people, animals, food, activities, travel, objects, symbols, and flags.
faq2Q: Can I use these emojis anywhere?
faq2A: Yes! Copied emojis work in any app that supports text input — messaging apps, social media, email, documents, and more.
faq3A: Yes — your recently copied emojis are saved locally in your browser. They persist between visits and are never sent to any server.
